page_description: Consultation pre-invoice (services and products). Amounts follow your clinic IGV settings.
solo_lectura_sin_permiso: You can open this screen but cannot enter amounts. Ask an admin to grant «Consultation charges → manage» (consulta-cargos.manage) or re-sync roles: php artisan db:seed --class=TenantRolesSeeder
estado_confirmado_aviso: This pre-invoice is already confirmed and cannot be edited here.

cobro.alert_title: Ready to collect at the register
cobro.alert_body: The pre-invoice is confirmed. Open checkout with preloaded lines.
cobro.sin_sesion_caja: Open your shift under Cash › Sessions before collecting this pre-invoice.
cobro.ya_cobrado_body: This pre-invoice was recorded as sale {{numero}}.
cobro.sin_permiso: Your role needs consulta-cargos.cobrar and ventas.create. Run: php artisan db:seed --class=PermissionsSeeder and TenantRolesSeeder, or assign receptionist/admin role. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) if you just updated the code.

hint_precio_incluye_igv: Unit prices include VAT ({{pct}}%). On save, base and VAT are split.
hint_precio_sin_igv: Unit prices exclude VAT. {{pct}}% VAT is applied to the taxable base.
imprimir_ticket_ayuda: Opens here; use Print in the dialog for your thermal printer ({{mm}} mm).
ticket_modal_description: Preview of what the printer would output. Close or send to print / PDF.
lineas_subtitle: Services and products for this visit.
sin_lineas: No lines yet. Add at least one to record charges.
